subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hearest the cry of them that long for Thee in their remoteness and separation, and the lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تسمع صریخ المشتاقین فی البعد و الفراق و ضجیج
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
